summary: Tightened qd roadmap finding validation so committed findings must have UUID-shaped identifiers, non-blank content, typed optional fields, timestamp-shaped lifecycle fields, and safe optional repo-relative source paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects findings[] entries with malformed id values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-malformed-id.log records the expected rejection for a non-UUID finding id.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects findings[] entries with blank title or evidence values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-blank-title-evidence.log records the expected rejection for blank title and evidence fields.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects absolute or traversal findings[].path values when path is present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-absolute-path.log and evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-traversal-path.log record the expected path rejections.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-positive or non-integer findings[].line values when line is present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-bad-line.log records the expected rejection for line 0.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects malformed created_at or resolved_at values and non-string optional text fields.
Optional finding path fields remain typed.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/negative-smoke-non-string-path.log records the expected rejection for an object-valued path.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing with the stricter checker.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains the requested positive logs plus temporary-copy negative smoke logs for malformed roadmap findings.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy non-string optional finding text smoke

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, or latency behavior is claimed.
